equiml
  • Index

Index

A | B | C | D | E | F | G | M | N | P | R | V

A

  • AUCParity (class in equiml.metrics)
  • audit() (in module equiml)
  • AuditResult (class in equiml.result)

B

  • BrierParity (class in equiml.metrics)

C

  • CalibrationParity (class in equiml.metrics)
  • compute() (equiml.metrics.AUCParity method)
    • (equiml.metrics.BrierParity method)
    • (equiml.metrics.CalibrationParity method)
    • (equiml.metrics.DemographicParity method)
    • (equiml.metrics.EqualizedOdds method)
    • (equiml.metrics.EqualOpportunity method)
    • (equiml.metrics.FairnessMetric method)
    • (equiml.metrics.PredictiveParity method)
  • confidence_interval (equiml.metrics.base.MetricResult attribute)
  • curve (equiml.metrics.base.MetricResult attribute)

D

  • DemographicParity (class in equiml.metrics)

E

  • EqualizedOdds (class in equiml.metrics)
  • EqualOpportunity (class in equiml.metrics)
  • extra (equiml.metrics.base.MetricResult attribute)

F

  • FairnessMetric (class in equiml.metrics)

G

  • groups (equiml.metrics.base.MetricResult attribute)
    • (equiml.result.AuditResult attribute)

M

  • MetricResult (class in equiml.metrics.base)
  • metrics (equiml.result.AuditResult attribute)

N

  • name (equiml.metrics.AUCParity property)
    • (equiml.metrics.base.MetricResult attribute)
    • (equiml.metrics.BrierParity property)
    • (equiml.metrics.CalibrationParity property)
    • (equiml.metrics.DemographicParity property)
    • (equiml.metrics.EqualizedOdds property)
    • (equiml.metrics.EqualOpportunity property)
    • (equiml.metrics.FairnessMetric property)
    • (equiml.metrics.PredictiveParity property)

P

  • p_value (equiml.metrics.base.MetricResult attribute)
  • pred_type (equiml.result.AuditResult attribute)
  • PredictiveParity (class in equiml.metrics)

R

  • requires (equiml.metrics.AUCParity property)
    • (equiml.metrics.BrierParity property)
    • (equiml.metrics.CalibrationParity property)
    • (equiml.metrics.DemographicParity property)
    • (equiml.metrics.EqualizedOdds property)
    • (equiml.metrics.EqualOpportunity property)
    • (equiml.metrics.FairnessMetric property)
    • (equiml.metrics.PredictiveParity property)

V

  • value (equiml.metrics.base.MetricResult attribute)
